evidence.snippet: We build secure, American-made aerial systems for teams who cannot afford failure.

Inspired Flight Technologies (IFT) designs, assembles, and supports NDAA-compliant drone platforms in the United States. Built for inspection, mapping, research, and public safety, our systems combine mission-ready reliability with secure architecture and long-term support.

evidence.snippet: 225 Suburban Rd, San Luis Obispo, CA 93401

Inspired Flight Technologies (IFT) designs, assembles, and supports NDAA-compliant drone platforms in the United States. Built for inspection, mapping, research, and public safety, our systems combine mission-ready reliability with secure architecture and long-term support.

Founded in 2017, Inspired Flight Technologies is a leading American drone manufacturer dedicated to advancing secure, mission-ready aerial systems. The company’s integrated hardware and software platforms are NDAA-compliant, cyber secure, and certified under the U.S. Department of Defense’s Blue UAS program as well as AUVSI’s Green UAS program, making them trusted for high-consequence government and commercial missions.

**Lincoln, Nebraska April 23rd, 2024** – Drone Amplified, a leader in drone-based firefighting technology, announces a strategic partnership with Inspired Flight Technologies (IFT), a top provider of advanced unmanned aircraft systems (UAS). This partnership brings the cutting-edge IGNIS 2 aerial ignition system to the Inspired Flight IF1200A drone platform.

Inspired Flight Technologies (IFT) designs, assembles, and supports NDAA-compliant drone platforms in the United States. Built for inspection, mapping, research, and public safety, our systems combine mission-ready reliability with secure architecture and long-term support.

Inspired Flight is a leading provider of data-secure, reliable, US-built drones to the commercial market and is currently supplying the US government with Group 1 & 2 UAVs that comply with [**NDAA section 848 requirements**](https://storage.googleapis.com/inspiredflight-com/uploads/NDAA-Compliance-Statement%205.53.08%20PM.pdf).

Founded in 2017, Inspired Flight Technologies is a leading American drone manufacturer dedicated to advancing secure, mission-ready aerial systems. The company’s integrated hardware and software platforms are NDAA-compliant, cyber secure, and certified under the U.S. Department of Defense’s Blue UAS program as well as AUVSI’s Green UAS program, making them trusted for high-consequence government and commercial missions.

ndaa.notes: Explicitly claims NDAA Section 848 compliance across multiple pages

blue_uas.notes: Dec 2025 press release explicitly states certified under the U.S. DoD Blue UAS program; also referenced as 'Blue sUAS Manufacturer' in DroneLife article republished on IFT site

evidence.snippet: 2025 Inspired Flight Product Catalog Now Available

Inspired Flight Technologies is proud to announce the release of our updated 2025 Product Catalog, featuring our latest U.S.-manufactured, NDAA-compliant drones, payloads, and mission-support accessories.

readiness.notes: Active online shop, 2025 product catalog, authorized dealer network, tiered Inspired Care support plans all confirm serial production

tagline: Small-to-medium multirotor airframes (IF800 TOMCAT quadcopter, IF1200/IF1200A hexacopter) plus ground control and ISR payload integration. NDAA-compliant, Blue UAS-listed, production-ready. Public evidence on defense/federal adoption remains thin; positioning targets commercial surveying, inspection, and research verticals.
